item.text: The repository is large enough that my first broad file listing was noisy, so I stopped it and will read the finding directly, then target only the mentioned files.

item.aggregated_output:
Project: apache/camel
Vulnerability type: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel (CWE-288)

Where the vulnerability is (file -> vulnerable line ranges, with enclosing function):

  components/camel-platform-http-main/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/platform/http/main/authentication/BasicAuthenticationConfigurer.java
    - lines 26-32
    - lines 35-46   in: public void configureAuthentication(
    - lines 64-75   in: public void configureAuthentication(

  components/camel-platform-http-main/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/platform/http/main/authentication/JWTAuthenticationConfigurer.java
    - lines 28-48
    - lines 72-83   in: public void configureAuthentication(

  components/camel-platform-http-main/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/platform/http/main/authentication/MainAuthenticationConfigurer.java
    - lines 19-24
    - lines 30-33   in: public interface MainAuthenticationConfigurer {

item.text: The finding points to the platform-http-main authentication configurers. I’m reading those classes and nearby tests/usages to see how requests are authorized and where an alternate route can bypass checks.

item.aggregated_output:
components/camel-platform-http-main/src/test/resources/jwt-auth.properties

camel.server.enabled=true

camel.server.authenticationEnabled=true
camel.server.authenticationPath=/*
camel.server.jwtKeystoreType=jks
camel.server.jwtKeystorePath=test-camel-main-auth-jwt.jks
camel.server.jwtKeystorePassword=changeme

item.text: The weak point is the auth handler is registered on a single Vert.x route path. For a non-wildcard base such as `/api`, descendants like `/api/foo` can be served by the HTTP server without hitting that auth handler, so I’m going to centralize path expansion and register both the exact path and its child wildcard where needed.
I’m about to edit the three flagged auth configurer files and add focused tests that assert non-wildcard authentication paths cover both the configured path and descendants for Basic and JWT.
The shared helper now expands paths once. I’m replacing the duplicated configurer code so Basic and JWT both use the same path handling.
Basic auth now uses the common expansion. I’m applying the same change to JWT so both auth modes have identical coverage.
I’m adding unit coverage at the configurer layer. That keeps the test fast and directly verifies the vulnerable mapping logic without needing to boot the full HTTP server.
The source and tests are in place. I’m running the targeted Maven test now; if it exposes a style or compile issue, I’ll correct it locally.

item.text: One more edge case is worth closing: an explicit child wildcard like `/secure/*` should also protect `/secure`, otherwise the base path remains an alternate unauthenticated path. I’m tightening that case while keeping the root wildcard as a single catch-all.
I’m updating the test expectations to cover that explicit child-wildcard case as well.
The local syntax check is clean so far. I’m trying Maven from the module directory next; that may avoid loading the root `.mvn/extensions.xml` that the network allowlist blocks.

item.text:
Implemented the remediation in the platform HTTP main authentication configurers.

Changed:
- [MainAuthenticationConfigurer.java](/work/components/camel-platform-http-main/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/platform/http/main/authentication/MainAuthenticationConfigurer.java): centralizes auth path expansion so non-wildcard paths protect both the exact path and descendants, and `/secure/*` also protects `/secure`.
- [BasicAuthenticationConfigurer.java](/work/components/camel-platform-http-main/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/platform/http/main/authentication/BasicAuthenticationConfigurer.java) and [JWTAuthenticationConfigurer.java](/work/components/camel-platform-http-main/src/main/java/org/apache/camel/component/platform/http/main/authentication/JWTAuthenticationConfigurer.java): now use the shared secure path registration logic.
- Added [AuthenticationConfigurerPathTest.java](/work/components/camel-platform-http-main/src/test/java/org/apache/camel/component/platform/http/main/authentication/AuthenticationConfigurerPathTest.java) covering Basic, JWT, management paths, root wildcard, and child wildcard behavior.

Verification:
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Targeted Maven test could not run because Maven fails before project compilation while resolving `.mvn/extensions.xml`; the required `org.l2x6.cq:cq-alias-fastinstall-quickly-extension:4.21.0` artifact is blocked by the environment’s egress allowlist, and only a `.lastUpdated` marker exists locally.
